kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page does not contain element 'xpath://button[@class='added-manually']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is not found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Congratulations'.
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Checkbox Should Be Selected
kw.doc: Verifies checkbox ``locator`` is selected/checked.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Checkbox Should Be Selected
kw.doc: Verifies checkbox ``locator`` is selected/checked.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Open Context Menu
kw.doc: Opens the context menu on the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Alert Should Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.

kw.name: Alert Should Not Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that no alert is present.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Drag And Drop
kw.doc: Drags the element identified by ``locator`` into the ``target`` element.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Drag And Drop
kw.doc: Drags the element identified by ``locator`` into the ``target`` element.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: You logged out of the secure area!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ESCAPE to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'id:result' contains exact text 'You entered: ESCAPE'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key SPACE to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'id:result' contains exact text 'You entered: SPACE'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
